title: aspidium eriocarpum
intro: Aspidium eriocarpum, also known as the Indian fern or Christmas fern, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aspidium eriocarpum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve joint pain, and boost the immune system. Aspidium eriocarpum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
